description_long: This object is a tall potted plant with long, broad, lance-shaped green leaves that radiate outward from a central base. The leaves have a distinct light green or whitish central vein and serrated edges, giving them a textured appearance. The plant is housed in a sleek, modern, dark-colored pot with a glossy finish and a rectangular profile. The base of the plant appears to be rooted in a brown, soil-like medium, partially visible at the top of the pot. The overall form is symmetrical, with leaves extending in all directions, creating a full and lush look. The design and materials suggest it is intended for decorative use in contemporary urban environments.
description: A tall, lush potted plant with long, serrated green leaves in a glossy, modern dark pot. The plant has a striking, symmetrical appearance and is suited for stylish urban interiors or exteriors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's broad, outward-spreading leaves and the glossy, rectangular pot.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the dense leaf arrangement and the pot's reflective surface.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the layered structure of the leaves and the pot's clean lines.
description_view_3: Back view displays the plant's symmetry and the way the leaves fan out from the center.
attribute_plant_species: bird's nest fern (Asplenium nidus) or similar broad-leafed fern
